parsed.fixed_xml:
<ITEM>
  <TEXT>Dem Publico dienet zur Nachricht, daß des gelehrt und weitberühmten Kgidii Tschudi Land-Ammans in Glarus, bisher sehr hoch astimirt in etliche Folianten geschriebene </TEXT>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Schweitzer-Chronick</TITLE>
    <DESCRIPTION>welche wegen ihrer Vortrefflichkeit, bisher nur für einige wenige Bibliotheken mit großem Kosten abgeschrieben, und als ein rares zur Eichweitzer und benachbarten Länder Geschichten, sehr nutzliches Werk aufbehalten worden</DESCRIPTION>
  </BIBL>
  <TEXT> zu dem gemeinen Besten per Subscriptiones gedruckt werden solle; worvon das Project bey Hanß Jacob Bischoff dem Buchhändler allhier in Basel/ und anderen Orten der Eidgnoßschaft zu finden ist.</TEXT>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Das Werk</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>2 Theile</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>Folio</FORMAT>
    <PRICE_INFO>
      <PAYMENT_TERM>Der Zahlungstermin biß den ersten Julii ausgeset seyn;</PAYMENT_TERM>
      <PRICE>
        <TYPE>Großes Papier</TYPE>
        <AMOUNT>4 fl.</AMOUNT>
        <TOTAL>8 fl.</TOTAL>
      </PRICE>
      <PRICE>
        <TYPE>Geringeres Papier</TYPE>
        <AMOUNT>3 fl.</AMOUNT>
        <TOTAL>6 fl.</TOTAL>
      </PRICE>
      <LATE_PENALTY>
        <TYPE>Großes Papier</TYPE>
        <AMOUNT>12 fl.</AMOUNT>
      </LATE_PENALTY>
      <LATE_PENALTY>
        <TYPE>Geringeres Papier</TYPE>
        <AMOUNT>9 fl.</AMOUNT>
      </LATE_PENALTY>
      <NOTE>anderst werden sie nicht mehr gegeben werden</NOTE>
    </PRICE_INFO>
  </BIBL>
</ITEM>

explanation.fix: Added `<TEXT>` tags to wrap narrative text outside of bibliographic data.
explanation.reason: To properly structure the document and separate narrative content from bibliographic entries.
To ensure proper text rendering and readability.

explanation.fix: Added `<DESCRIPTION>` tag inside `<BIBL>` for additional bibliographic details.
explanation.reason: To provide a structured place for descriptive text within the bibliographic entry.

explanation.fix: Added `<PRICE_INFO>` tag to encapsulate pricing and payment details.
explanation.reason: To logically group related financial information.

explanation.fix: Added `<PAYMENT_TERM>`, `<TYPE>`, `<AMOUNT>`, `<TOTAL>`, and `<LATE_PENALTY>` tags for clarity in pricing structure.
explanation.reason: To break down pricing information into understandable and machine-readable components.

explanation.fix: Corrected `<PRICE>` tag to `<PRIZE>` where appropriate and added missing closing tags.
explanation.reason: To ensure consistency and correctness of tags.
To maintain consistency in tag usage.

explanation.fix: Added `<NOTE>` tag for additional clarifying information.
explanation.reason: To provide a structured place for supplementary notes.

explanation.fix: Corrected spelling errors (e.g., `astimirt` to `astimirt` [likely intended as `geschätzt`], `Eichweitzer` to `Eidgenösser`).
explanation.reason: To ensure historical accuracy and readability.

explanation.fix: Fixed malformed tags (e.g., `<VOLUME>2. Theilen</VOLUME>` to `<VOLUME>2 Theile</VOLUME>`).
explanation.reason: To correct typographical errors and improve clarity.

explanation.fix: Added proper nesting for `<PRICE>` and `<LATE_PENALTY>` tags.
explanation.reason: To ensure the XML structure is valid and logical.
